title: Mist Bound
description: “Throughout this heaven and earth, MistBound lingers like a silent storm... unseen, unbroken, eternal.”
body: ![MistBound](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb8ba582723f3de1094a63a45731287376e720b8.png) **Mist Bound** is a shader pack that brings the cinematic magic of movies to the Minecraft universe. It was built for **both Iris & Optifine** and aims to add lighting effects, atmospheric fog, cinematic color grading, soft shadows, glowing lanterns, and environment effects to make the Minecraft world come alive. The idea is to provide visuals that can give players a glimpse of what life would be like in a Minecraft fantasy movie. ### NOTE: This Shader MAY Have Support on older verisons but it was never tested.
